message:
🐛 Improve Kagenti error messages with contextual guidance

- Classify fetch errors in agentFetch(): network errors become 'Kagenti
  agent not connected', timeouts become 'request timed out', HTTP errors
  include status codes with context
- Deduplicate identical error messages in agentFetchAllClusters() so
  3 clusters failing with the same error show one message + cluster count
- Show actionable hint in AIAgents.tsx when Kagenti is not connected
- Add i18n key 'notConnectedHint' across all 9 locale files

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
